blog.body:
# Welcome to Harvard in Tech

Harvard in Tech connects alumni building, investing in, and leading technology companies around the world.

## What we do

- Monthly chapter mixers in NYC, SF, LA, and Tokyo
- An annual Summit bringing together founders, operators, and investors
- A members-only WhatsApp community for introductions and deal flow

Join us at an upcoming event, or reach out to your local chapter to get involved.
blog.summary: Why we built a global community for Harvard alumni in technology — and how to get involved.
blog.title: Welcome to Harvard in Tech
